data.current_description: Retrieves the USD price of the specified token.
data.summary_suggestion: Get current USD price for token
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current USD price for a specified token. Accepts a token identifier (address or symbol) as input. Returns the token's current market price in USD. Price data is updated in real-time from market sources.
data.reasoning: Original summary is just the method name, not action-oriented. Description lacks clarity on what token identifier format is expected and what the response structure contains. Enhanced version specifies input requirements, output format, and data freshness for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'post_?ankr_getTokenTransfers' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is just the method name. Description is incomplete regarding input parameters (filtering options), output structure, and scope (which blockchains are supported). Enhanced version clarifies what parameters are accepted, what data is returned, and operational scope for AI agents.

data.current_description: Retrieves the details of token transfers for the specified wallet address.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve token transfer history for wallet
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of token transfer transactions for a specified wallet address. Accepts a wallet address as input and optional filters (token type, date range, pagination). Returns transfer details including sender, recipient, token, amount, timestamp, and transaction hash. Supports multiple blockchain networks.
